title: buffer overread in sqlite3_printf functions.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL LIMIT 1);
